description: Style NoteSandal-style wedges from catwalk for the desi diva. These heels are synonymous with good taste and practicality with their durable straps and stylish wedge-heels. Wear this with denims, a kurti and matching accessories. You can also wear this with casual tops.Heel: 3 cmProduct DetailsCriss-crossing mustard, purple and pink forefoot and mifdoot straps with a toe separatorHas a padded footbed with a heel capTough wedge heel with a tough heel that has grooves all overMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
